title: bulbophyllum coelochilum
intro: Bulbophyllum coelochilum is a species of orchid, a type of flowering plant that is native to New Guinea and the Philippines. This orchid has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, derived from its roots. The health benefits of Bulbophyllum coelochilum include its potential to aid in the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce inflammation and promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Bulbophyllum coelochilum often involve boiling or decocting the roots to create a medicinal tea or infusion, which is then consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
